title: QR Scanner
profTagline: Scan a QR and see where the link goes — the host, the full URL and a safety verdict — before you ever tap it. Catches quishing tricks: shortened links, look-alike (homograph) domains, hidden real hosts, insecure and code-running codes. Rear camera, on-device, offline; works with the native scanner or a bundled fallback.
primeReason: To read QR codes with the rear camera
fUserinfo: Real host is hidden before the @
fCode: Runs code, not a web page
fIp: Raw IP address, not a name
installDesc: Works offline, opens like an app
installIosHint: In Safari: tap Share, then Add to Home Screen.
installGenericHint: In the browser menu choose Install or Add to Home Screen.
